name: Elizabeth M.
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

I've been working with Synup now for about a little under a year and they are incredibly responsive and always looking for ways to help improve our digital footprint on the web. I'm thankful for their partnership. Keeping our web listings up-to-date is no easy task and they make it so much easier to manage.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Nothing yet. It can be a little clunky getting around, but once you figure out where everything is, it's great.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

Synup is working with Google to set up a bulk verification process. I tried taking this on myself. It was time-consuming and exhausting to deal with Google. I'm so glad they're taking it on now. Hoping to get this resolved soon, thanks to Niladri's expertise.
